diagrams.title: Functional Elements Chain Flowchart
diagrams.description: A linear flowchart showing the sequence of six functional elements from waste generation to disposal
diagrams.purpose: Helps students visualize the sequential nature of SWM and understand how each element builds upon the previous one

diagrams.title: Waste Hierarchy Pyramid
diagrams.description: A pyramid diagram with five levels showing waste management options ranked by preference
diagrams.purpose: Visual representation of priority in waste management decisions - top is most preferred

diagrams.title: Sanitary Landfill Cross-Section
diagrams.description: Vertical cross-section showing layers and components of a modern sanitary landfill
diagrams.purpose: Understanding engineered components that make landfilling environmentally safe

diagrams.title: Transfer Station Operation
diagrams.description: Schematic showing the operation of a waste transfer station
elements: Large vehicles exiting to disposal site
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how transfer stations improve transportation efficiency and reduce costs

visuals.title: Functional Elements Of Swm
visuals.description: Visual diagram for functional elements of swm
